chapter_title: Transfer of Title or Interest in Undocumented Vessel
text: Upon transfer of the title or any interest of the legal owner or legal owners in an undocumented vessel numbered under this code, the transferor shall write his signature, and the transferee shall write his signature and address, in the appropriate spaces provided upon the reverse side of the certificate of ownership issued for the vessel.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3.5. REGISTRATION AND TRANSFER OF VESSELS [9840 - 9928]
### Chapter 3. Transfer of Title or Interest in Undocumented Vessel [9900 - 9928]
##### § 9907

Upon transfer of the title or any interest of the legal owner or legal owners in an undocumented vessel numbered under this code, the transferor shall write his signature, and the transferee shall write his signature and address, in the appropriate spaces provided upon the reverse side of the certificate of ownership issued for the vessel.

*(Added by Stats. 1970, Ch. 1428.)*

subsections.text: Upon transfer of the title or any interest of the legal owner or legal owners in an undocumented vessel numbered under this code, the transferor shall write his signature, and the transferee shall write his signature and address, in the appropriate spaces provided upon the reverse side of the certificate of ownership issued for the vessel.
